pages.title: Data Warehouse Architecture
pages.body: Core warehouse tables live in core.customers, core.orders, core.products, marketing.campaigns, and events.product_events. The customer 360 mart is refreshed by daily_etl and checked by dbt tests.

pages.title: On-call Runbook
pages.body: For Snowflake outages, pause downstream dbt jobs and notify analytics-eng@dataclaw.com.

pages.title: Glossary
pages.body: LTV is lifetime revenue minus refunds and support adjustment.

pages.title: Snowflake Outage Procedure
pages.body: Declare SEV2, pause Airflow daily_etl and dbt production jobs, pin dashboards to the latest successful customer_360 snapshot, and record recovery notes in ENG.

pages.title: dbt Ownership Map
pages.body: stg_customers feeds int_customer_orders, int_customer_activity, dim_customers, and fct_revenue_daily. Analytics engineering owns tests and exposures.

pages.title: Airbyte Failure Playbook
pages.body: If failing_api_to_postgres reports malformed JSON, capture job logs, disable the connection, and page the source API owner.

pages.title: Dagster Asset Catalog
pages.body: core_customers and core_orders are in core_assets; campaign_spend is in marketing_assets; daily_revenue_snapshot is partitioned daily.

pages.title: Prefect Runbook
pages.body: failing_flow should surface warehouse timeout text. daily_sync is safe to rerun after checking duplicate guards.

pages.title: GitHub Review Policy
pages.body: The data-warehouse repository keeps two open PRs for Phase H: Fix customer 360 freshness and Document payments reconciliation.

pages.title: Data Quality SLAs
pages.body: core.orders must refresh hourly, derived.customer_360 must refresh weekly, and marketing.email_sends must load within 30 minutes.
